<my resources> X: 5, Y: 25 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
<reason> Player RED is offering 10 X for 5 Y. I currently have 5 X and 25 Y. Accepting this trade would give me 10 X (total 15 X) and reduce my Y to 20. Additionally, since this is the last round, I should not hold out for a better offer. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> I accept your trade offer. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
